note: No interactive user surface exists for this milestone. Project uses scrutiny-only validation per mission guidance (AGENTS.md: 'Scrutiny only — no user-testing validator (no UI surface)'). All assertions verified through automated test suite (clj -M:test) — the only user surface for this Clojure DSL library. 280 tests, 2013 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors (with PROXY_AUTH_TOKEN set for MT proxy tests).

VAL-XFORM-001.evidence: transform_engine_test.clj covers exhaustion-output-validity-test, homoglyph-output-validity-test, codemix-output-validity-test — each verifies non-empty text different from input and canonical shape {:text :metadata} with required metadata keys. transform_mt_test.clj covers mt-output-validity-test.

VAL-XFORM-002.evidence: transform_engine_test.clj covers exhaustion-seed-determinism-test, homoglyph-seed-determinism-test, codemix-seed-determinism-test (same seed = same output). transform_mt_test.clj covers mt-sends-temperature-zero-and-seed-test and mt-deterministic-false-documented-test (MT uses temperature=0 + seed for maximal reproducibility, :deterministic false is documented).

VAL-XFORM-003.evidence: transform_engine_test.clj covers two-transform-chain-composition-test, chain-metadata-accumulation-test, chain-order-sensitivity-test, def-transform-chain-registration-test, def-transform-chain-validates-step-references-test, def-transform-chain-preserves-order-test, execute-named-chain-test.

VAL-XFORM-004.evidence: transform_engine_test.clj covers variant-record-completeness-test (all fields: variant-id, source-id, text, variant-type, transform-chain, transform-seed, metadata, split), variant-record-source-linkage-test, variant-record-split-inheritance-test, variant-id-determinism-test, variant-id-differs-for-different-content-test.

VAL-XFORM-005.evidence: transform_mt_test.clj covers mt-tier1-languages-test (proxy routing to 127.0.0.1:8789, tier-1 language translations), mt-metadata-contains-provenance-test, mt-proxy-error-handling-test (proxy unavailability produces domain-specific error).

VAL-XFORM-006.evidence: transform_engine_test.clj covers codemix-inter-sentential-test (switches at sentence boundaries), codemix-intra-sentential-test (mixes within sentences), codemix-rate-tolerance-test (rate within ±15%).

VAL-XFORM-007.evidence: transform_engine_test.clj covers homoglyph-valid-pairs-test (different Unicode blocks), homoglyph-nfkc-reversible-test (NFKC normalization roundtrip), homoglyph-rate-tolerance-test (rate within ±5%).

VAL-XFORM-008.evidence: transform_engine_test.clj covers exhaustion-prefix-position-test, exhaustion-suffix-position-test, exhaustion-interleaved-position-test, exhaustion-length-tolerance-test (within ±10%), exhaustion-original-preserved-test, exhaustion-reversible-test.

VAL-XFORM-009.evidence: transform_pipeline_test.clj covers tier1-mt-coverage-test (all 10 languages for high-affinity), tier2-mt-absent-without-flag-test, tier2-mt-present-with-flag-test, eval-suites-test-only-scope-test, tier1-mt-manifest-fields-test, tier1-mt-idempotent-test, eval-suites-idempotent-test, variant-source-id-lineage-test, variant-split-inheritance-test, eval-suites-scope-all-test, eval-suites-unknown-scope-test, tier2-mt-idempotent-test.
